herosection.herotitle: The hadiths as they have never been narrated before
herosection.herodescription: Explore the locations mentioned in the sayings of the Prophet

whatweoffer.offertitle: What does the platform offer you ?
whatweoffer.desfeature1: Search and focus on the hadiths that matter to you with the least effort and faster.
whatweoffer.feature2: Interactive map of the prophetic places
whatweoffer.desfeature2: Explore the places associated with the Hadiths through a unique visual experience.
whatweoffer.desfeature3: An organized experience that makes it easy for you to access the right hadith effortlessly.
whatweoffer.desfeature4: Listen to the hadith clearly and in a way that makes it easier for you to understand and comprehend.
